name: Laser Photonics Corp
summary: Laser Photonics Corp is a vertically integrated manufacturer of photonics-based industrial laser products headquartered in Orlando, Florida. The company offers laser blasting, cleaning, rust removal, de-coating, welding, cutting, and marking solutions targeting automotive, aerospace, shipbuilding, nuclear, and pharmaceutical industries. Following the acquisition of Control Micro Systems, Inc., it expanded into pharmaceutical laser systems for micro-drilling controlled-release tablets. It also develops the Laser Shield Anti-Drone System (LSAD) and reported net revenues of $3.415 million by December 31, 2024.
